# Wiz Recognized as a 2025 Customers’ Choice in the Gartner® Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for CNAPP | Wiz Blog

At Wiz, everything starts with the trust our customers place in us. The insights and experiences shared by practitioners guide our roadmap and drive the way we innovate. That feedback, we feel,  is reflected once again in Gartner latest Peer Insights Voice of the Customer report for Cloud Native Application Protection Platforms, where Wiz is the only vendor recognized as a Customers’ Choice for two consecutive years.
This year’s Voice of the Customer for CNAPP evaluates vendors based on 18 months of verified customer reviews ending 31 October 2025. The report incorporates
Overall Experience
and
User Interest and Adoption
. This includes review volume, global coverage, and willingness to recommend.
What makes this recognition special
The Voice of the Customer report provides a consolidated, peer-driven perspective designed to help organizations navigate a crowded
CNAPP landscape
. It centers the experiences of real practitioners who secure cloud-native environments every day. It highlights what truly drives value in this category.
Instead of vendor-driven marketing, these reviews offer unfiltered insights from customers who have implemented, operated, and scaled
CNAPP platforms
in production.
What customers are saying about Wiz:
Ease of Implementation for Multi-Cloud Environments
Wiz Is The Best All In One CNAPP Platform To Monitor Multicloud. We moved to Wiz from a competitor in the CNAPP space and it was a real game changer. UX is super clean, and access to the information is always where you want it. Wiz allows us to monitor all our cloud infrastructure and make decisions right in time.
-Chief Security and IT Officer, Software Company
Born for the cloud with ease of use and exceptional time to value
As the VP IT Infrastructure and Cybersecurity at a leading global logistics enterprise deploying across AWS, Azure, GCP, and OCI, selecting Wiz has been one of the most impactful decisions for our IT Infrastructure and Cybersecurity posture. Not only has it accelerated our risk visibility, but it has also dramatically elevated our compliance maturity-across a number of security frameworks and many internal standards."
-VP, IT Security and Risk Management
End to end visibility with actionable context
The Wiz Code + Wiz Code integration, especially the Security Graph Explorer, is outstanding. It clearly visualizes connections from source code all the way to associated cloud resources. The end-to-end visibility has been instrumental in identifying resource distribution and pinpointing vulnerabilities across each layer of our environment. Wiz Defend stands out for its near real-time detection and contextual insights. It provides deep visibility into cloud, system and runtime events, enabling faster investigations without the inefficiency of querying multiple systems. Significantly reduced our MTTI and MTTR.
-Lead Security Engineer, IT Services Industry
Wiz has been a fantastic product. It was easy to implement across our multi-cloud environment and has reduced the total number of false positive alerts we receive by 90%.
-Security Engineer, IT Services
These reviews reinforce a consistent pattern we see each year. Customers choose Wiz because it helps them simplify cloud security, prioritize risk, and support closer collaboration between security and development teams.
Thank you to our customers
To everyone who shared a review, thank you. Your candid feedback shapes our roadmap, accelerates improvements, and ensures we stay focused on what matters most: helping you secure your cloud at scale.
Your trust drives every decision we make and we are committed to delivering the best
CNAPP
experience in the industry.
To read additional customer reviews and to understand why Gartner recognized Wiz as a Customers’ Choice for CNAPP,
please read the full report
.
Gartner, Voice of the Customer for Cloud-Native Application Protection Platforms, December 2025.
Gartner Peer Insights content represents the opinions of individual end users based on their experiences.
